title: spergularia marginata subsp. angustata
intro: Spergularia marginata subsp. angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved sand spurrey, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Spergularia marginata subsp. angustata include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
